context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate Dashboard + Margin Protection Pack fully tested. All 6 affiliate pages (/partner/affiliate-dashboard, affiliate-promotions, affiliate-sales, affiliate-earnings, affiliate-payouts, affiliate-profile) load correctly. Margin rules API calculates correctly: base 100000 with 20% markup = 120000 protected, 10% distributable = 10000 extra layer, selling price = 130000. Affiliate gets 1000 (10% of distributable). Company protected markup is never touched. Note: Frontend pages use static data, not connected to backend APIs.
